transcript: Slow down, let's give her a ride. She's like two ways. Come on! I didn't even do anything! look like you need a ride um actually I'm okay. Don't look it. Come on. I don't bite. Blue Thermos is coffee. Red's whiskey. Help yourself. I'm okay. Thanks. Where are you headed? Just as close as you can get to Port Mary would be great. Checking my feed for danger signs? I get it a lot. 1.4 got to be an antisocial maniac, right? You seem... Normal? Yeah. Thank you. It took some effort. What happened to you? I mean, you're at 2.8, but you don't look 2.8 that's not this is temporary i'm i'm gonna turn it around i'm going to a wedding made of honor nice want to hear my speech no so how come you're too late well got marked down at the airport for yelling, and they put me on double damage. How did it feel? Awful. I meant the yelling. I don't know. I was mad. Look at where it got me. But as long as I get to the wedding, do the speech, they'll overlook the two-eight. I'm with the bride, and if I do well, well, they're all high four, so that velocitates my arc. And once they lift the point penalty, well, then my average goes way up. And, yeah, it's going to be okay. God, you remind me of me Not now I was 4.6 once

um actually I'm okay. Don't look it. Come on. I don't bite. Blue Thermos is coffee. Red's whiskey. Help yourself. I'm okay. Thanks. Where are you headed? It took some effort. What happened to you?
